body_txt: There seems to be an unwritten rule that all kids show hosts, except for Mr. Rogers who is an archetype unto himself, must act excitable and zany, if not downright bonkers. Kids do seem to genuinely enjoy this sort of thing, but it can seem irritating to many adults, although there are definitely instances where this type of kids show host can even attract a Periphery Demographic of parents and non-parents if they’re likable enough.There actually seem to be different approaches to this:  Related to the Misplaced Kindergarten Teacher (and may be one themselves). For their disturbing jerk of a cousin, see Depraved Kids' Show Host .
